title: Ubiquiti AF11-Complete-LB, airFiber 11, low band
description: airFiber 11 is the first modular airFiber radio system purpose-built for the 11 GHz licensed frequency market that breaks free from the congested 5 GHz band. Housed in a compact, highly efficient form factor, airFiber 11 delivers amazing wireless gigabit+ performance, low latency, and long range, making it ideal for carrier backhaul, building-to-building enterprise use, or public safety applications Full duplex point-to-point radio 11 GHz frequency operation Up to 1.2+ Gbps throughput Includes one low-band duplexer for SISO mode (MIMO mode requires an optional second duplexer) Integrates with AF-11G35 11 GHz antenna Supports separate TX/RX frequencies Accepts PoE or DC power Device AF-11 Antenna Low band duplexer Antenna holder PoE power adapter Power cord
specsSearch: Wireless features MIMO, SISO 1 x 1 (2 x 2 optionaly) Polarization V or H, VH, Slant (+- 45 °) Tx power [dBm] 30 Sensitivity [dBm] 95 VSWR < 2,0 Frequency range [MHz] 10300 - 11700 Maximum modulation 1024 QAM Channel bandwidth [MHz] 7, 10, 5, 30, 50, 14, 28, 20, 3,5, 56, 40 Transmission speed - 11GHz [Mb/s] 1376 Security 128bit AES Elevation beam width (-6dB) [°] 2,5 Azimuth beam width (-6dB) [°] 2,5 Type of antenna Detachable Detachable antennas 4 Antenna gain [dBi] 35 Connectors and Interfaces RF connectors (4) RSMA female LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps + (1) 10/100Mbps (managment) Power Power over Ethernet 50V DC PoE type PoE-In (only) Max. power consumption [W] 36 Power via connector/terminal 38 .. 56V DC Physical characteristics Antenna design Parabolic Purpose Outdoor Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 55 Width [mm] 811 Height [mm] 811 Depth [mm] 460 Hardware CPU INVICTUS 2 IC
